## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d600f62601b3ef4d6ea7db1aac9f455bd055261267c5aba876f13aa72111b2f8)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'money-badger-open-rpc' @ 99.99.99 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
